nasb.text: You shall take all the fat that covers the entrails and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys and the fat that is on them, and offer them up in smoke on the altar.

esv.text: And you shall take all the fat that covers the entrails, and the long lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them, and burn them on the altar.

cnv.text: 你要把一切遮蓋內臟的脂油、肝葉、兩個腰子和腰子上的脂油，都取出來，把它們焚燒在祭壇上。

ccb.text: 再把遮盖内脏的脂肪、肝、两个肾脏和附在上面的脂肪都放在祭坛上烧掉。
